bird.name: Hooded plover
bird.summary: The hooded plover or hooded dotterel (Thinornis cucullatus) is a species of bird in the family Charadriidae. It is endemic to southern Aust…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

relations.subject: Hooded plover
relations.evidence: It is endemic to southern Australia, where it inhabits ocean beaches and subcoastal lagoons

relations.subject: Hooded plover
relations.evidence: The population of hooded plovers has declined in eastern Australia as a result of disturbance by people, dogs, cats and horses, as well as predation by silver gulls (Larus novaehollandiae), ravens (Corvus spp) and introduced foxes. Fox predation is a major threat to the western subspecies
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
